PostToolUse.command: file_path=$(echo "$MCP_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); case "$file_path" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac
file_path=$(echo "$MCP_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); case "$file_path" in */lib/*.ts|*/app/page.tsx) npm run test 2>&1 | tail -15 ;; esac

PreToolUse.command: file_path=$(echo "$MCP_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); case "$file_path" in */src/data/*) echo 'BLOCK: Data files are generated. Use npm run import or the scrape script instead.' && exit 1 ;; esac
